title: LANCER Motley Narrative Rules
description: Replaces the LANCER system's skill-trigger check with a d6 dice-pool house rule (roll 1 + rank d6, +Accuracy / -Difficulty, count 4+ successes, 6-only when Hard) and displays trigger ranks as +{rank}d6 instead of +2/+4/+6. Installs alongside the lancer system; no macro or sheet edits required.
